title: carthamus cancellatus
intro: Carthamus cancellatus, also known as the prickly salsify, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carthamus cancellatus include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and improve skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Carthamus cancellatus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
